# Illinois Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
> Free Illinois bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, Illinois exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what to expect ...

## About
illinoisbankruptcy.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Illinois Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide: https://illinoisbankruptcy.org/

Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
